name: @loopworx/forge
description: AI-driven software delivery orchestrator — standalone CLI with TUI

scripts.build: bun build bin/forge.ts --outfile dist/forge.js --external @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external @earendil-works/pi-ai --external @opentui/core --external typebox --external winston --external 'node:*' && bun -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/forge.js';let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!'))fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env bun\n'+c);fs.chmodSync(f,0o755)"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build
